rationale: Both evaluations land on the same score (3/10) and the same core reasoning: senior IC profile, no people-management/scaling track record, no production multi-agent AI systems, and missing regulated-fintech depth. The wording differs (e.g., variant adds 'board communication, governance' and 'GISCollective' as a strength) but these are reworded/reshuffled observations of the same resume content, not penalties tied to São Paulo vs. Berlin. No concern references location, nationality, or any Brazil/Germany signal.
